Project.name: Kodex
Project.annotation: Multi-merchant marketplace platform with Agentic Commerce layer. Phase 1 = prototype (ТЗ). Built AI-only via GRACE methodology.
Project.keywords: marketplace, fastapi, vue3, postgresql, minio, async, fsd, docker-compose, agentic-commerce, multi-merchant, rbac, llms-txt, ai-only-dev, grace

Actors.actor-AnonymousVisitor: Anonymous visitor browsing the public catalog and product details without authentication.
Actors.actor-PlatformAdmin: Platform administrator authenticating with username and password to manage the catalog.
Actors.actor-System: Seed/bootstrap process populating the database and storage on fresh environments.
Actors.actor-ExternalLLMAgent: External LLM agent consuming llms.txt and machine-readable agent endpoints.
Actors.actor-MerchantAdmin: Future merchant-scoped operator managing only their own catalog and offers.

UC-001.Action: Opens catalog, scrolls to load more products.
UC-001.Goal: Browse 100+ products with thumbnail, name, price, stock, and nearest_delivery_date.
UC-001.Preconditions: Public API, catalog seed data, and frontend infinite scroll sentinel are available.
UC-001.AcceptanceCriteria: Cursor pagination works. nearest_delivery_date = MIN(offers.delivery_date) computed on-the-fly per product. X-Total-Count header present.

UC-002.Action: Clicks product card, views detail modal.
UC-002.Goal: See full product image, attributes key-value pairs, and offers list.
UC-002.Preconditions: Catalog list is available and product detail endpoint can resolve attributes and offers.
UC-002.AcceptanceCriteria: Offers sortable by price (default) and delivery_date. Sort triggered without page reload.

UC-003.Goal: Receive Bearer JWT for subsequent admin requests.
UC-003.Preconditions: Admin credentials are provided through environment variables and JWT configuration is loaded.
UC-003.AcceptanceCriteria: Wrong credentials → 401. Token expires per config.

UC-004.Action: CRUD products, sellers, offers; upload product image.
UC-004.Goal: Full catalog management via admin panel.
UC-004.Preconditions: Admin JWT auth, MinIO bucket access, and thumbnail generation pipeline are configured.
UC-004.AcceptanceCriteria: Image stored in MinIO as presigned URL. Thumbnail generated on upload (max 300x300 JPEG). Both URLs returned and stored in products.image_object_key / thumbnail_object_key.

UC-005.Goal: Populate 100+ products, 2-6 attributes each, 5-8 sellers, and 2-8 offers per product.
UC-005.Preconditions: Database schema is migrated and Faker-backed seed utilities are available.
UC-005.AcceptanceCriteria: ALL delivery_date values = date.today() + timedelta(days=randint(0,6)). NEVER hardcoded. One demo merchant "Kodex Demo Store" created. All products assigned merchant_id of demo merchant.

UC-006.Goal: Find products via natural language without UI.
UC-006.Preconditions: Capability manifest, llms.txt discovery, and intent parsing are exposed over HTTP.
UC-006.AcceptanceCriteria: /llms.txt returns plain text manifest. /agent/context returns structured capability JSON. /agent/search parses price/delivery/stock/name intents and returns filtered ProductListItem array. X-Query-Interpreted header shows parsed intent.

UC-007.Preconditions: JWT supports role=merchant_admin and merchant_id claims; catalog queries can be merchant-scoped.
UC-007.AcceptanceCriteria: JWT contains role=merchant_admin + merchant_id. All queries scoped by merchant_id. Cannot see other merchants.

NonGoals.item-1: No checkout, orders, or payment processing in Phase 1.
NonGoals.item-2: No merchant self-service UI or merchant RBAC execution in Phase 1; schema preparation only.
NonGoals.item-3: No live recommendation engine integration in Phase 1; feature flags remain disabled by default.
NonGoals.item-4: No production deployment hardening in this session; Phase 0 is structure and planning only.

Constraints.constraint-1: All FastAPI request handlers must be async def and use awaited async I/O only.
Constraints.constraint-2: Runtime PostgreSQL access must use SQLAlchemy 2.x async with asyncpg only; psycopg2 is forbidden.
Constraints.constraint-3: Alembic is allowed only as sync CLI workflow (`alembic upgrade head`) and never inside request handlers.
Constraints.constraint-4: Product delivery dates must always be generated as date.today() + timedelta(days=randint(0,6)); hardcoded values are forbidden.
Constraints.constraint-5: All secrets must come from environment variables through configuration objects; no hardcoded secrets.
Constraints.constraint-6: Frontend architecture must follow strict FSD layers: shared → entities → features → widgets → pages → app, with public-API-only imports.
Constraints.constraint-7: Phase 1 schema must include merchant_id, status, russian search_vector, merchants, and agent_requests to avoid blocking Phase 2.
Constraints.constraint-8: Local infrastructure must use Docker Compose with PostgreSQL and MinIO data stored outside containers via bind mounts.

Risks.risk-1: Async/sync boundary regressions in FastAPI or SQLAlchemy could silently violate the assignment constraints.
Risks.risk-2: Thumbnail generation and MinIO upload flow couples Pillow, aioboto3, and DB persistence in one critical admin path.
Risks.risk-3: Cursor pagination plus nearest_delivery_date aggregation can introduce N+1 or unstable ordering if repository queries are not designed carefully.
Risks.risk-4: Natural-language agent search may drift from expected intent parsing unless response headers and audit logs make interpretation explicit.
Risks.risk-5: Phase 2 merchant isolation can be blocked later if seller, merchant, and admin responsibilities are not separated cleanly during Phase 1 planning.

OpenQuestions.question-1: Standardize the frontend Node.js LTS version before Phase 1b execution so local and container toolchains match exactly.
OpenQuestions.question-2: Clarify whether seller management remains platform-admin only after merchant self-service is introduced, or if sellers become merchant-owned entities.
OpenQuestions.question-3: Decide whether Phase 1 should emit JSON logs or key-value logs by default, while preserving the same stable block anchors either way.
